era: 1980-present. Hardcore Punk. E=8 -- relentless, fast, politically charged. Seattle.
members: Lineup has evolved across 40+ years; founding 1980 Seattle hardcore generation

theory_nodes.concept: E=17 combined with SPS 273 (Orca breaching E=9). Highest combined energy in engine history. Engine apex at degree 273.
theory_nodes.description: The Refuzors E=8 + Orca breaching E=9 = E=17. First and only time engine reaches E=17.

theory_nodes.concept: Forty-plus years of continuous hardcore operation. 1980-present. Seattle's longest-running hardcore band. Anti-commercial imperative sustained across four decades.
theory_nodes.description: The endurance argument: continuity as punk integrity.

theory_nodes.concept: Seattle hardcore founding generation (1980). The Fartz, U-Men, Refuzors as the three-band founding arc. Transition from punk to hardcore in Seattle at the precise national moment.
theory_nodes.description: Seattle hardcore 1980: regional expression of national transition.

cross_references.relationship: E rises from 6 to 8. Art-punk to hardcore. Seattle hardcore generation: U-Men and Refuzors are peers from 1980 founding era.
E=8 holds. Hardcore streak at 273-274. Capitol Hill node.
Seattle hardcore founding peer. Both E=8. The Fartz and Refuzors represent the sustained hardcore branch of the 1980 Seattle generation.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=9. COMBINED E=17 -- ENGINE APEX. Orca arc opens. Six-ton whale fully airborne. The Refuzors 40 years at maximum. Neither holds anything back.
